category_sources: source_facts.description says it generates SPDX-compliant Bill of Materials manifests; official docs describe bom as an SBOM generation tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bom; official Kubernetes SIGs docs use the command name bom.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Kubernetes SIGs bom documentation site; official docs include Quick Start and CLI Reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/bom, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SPDX Bill of Materials generation; official docs describe SBOM/SPDX generation and CLI use.
